somali.review_your_mission_objectives_and_cre: Dib u eeg yoolalka hawshaada iyo qoondaynta shaqaalaha
somali.countdown_and_liftoff_from_kennedy_spa: Tirinta hoos u dhaca iyo kacitaanka Kennedy Space Center
somali.reach_low_earth_orbit_and_prepare_for_: Gaadh wareegga Dhulka ee hooseeya oo u diyaargarow Trans-Lunar Injection
somali.3_day_journey_to_the_moon_384_400_km: Safar 3 maalmood ah ee Dayaxa — km 384,400
somali.pilot_the_lunar_module_to_the_surface: Kaxee qaybta dayaxa ilaa dusha sare
somali.explore_the_lunar_surface_and_collect_: Sahmi dusha dayaxa oo aruuri muunadaha
somali.launch_from_the_moon_and_rendezvous_wi: Ka bilaaw Dayaxa oo la kulan qaybta amarka
somali.survive_re_entry_and_splash_down_in_th: Ka bad baxso dib-u-galitaanka oo ku deg Badweynta Baasifigga
somali.pilots_the_lunar_module_to_the_surface: Wuxuu kaxeeyaa qaybta dayaxa ilaa dusha sare wuxuuna hoggaamiyaa EVA
somali.orbits_the_moon_alone_in_the_command_m: Wuxuu keligiis ku wareegaa Dayaxa qaybta amarka inta CDR iyo LMP ay sahminayaan
somali.assists_with_descent_and_eva_operates_: Wuxuu kaalmeeyaa soo degitaanka iyo EVA, wuxuu shaqeeyaa qalabka sayniska
somali.this_ancient_rock_from_the_lunar_highl: Dhagaxan qadiimiga ah ee buuraha dayaxa wuxuu jiraa sannado bilyan 4.4 — ku dhowaad da' weyn sida Dayaxa lafteeda. Wuxuu noo sheegayaa in Dayaxu mar lahaa badweyn magma adduunka oo dhan.
somali.dark_volcanic_basalt_filled_the_moon_s: Basalt foolkaanik madow ayaa buuxiyay barkadaha saamaynta waaweyn ee Dayaxa wuxuuna sameeyay «badaha» madow (maria) ee laga arko Dhulka. Laafadahan waxay qarxeen sannado bilyan 3-3.5 ka hor.
somali.a_jumbled_mix_of_rock_fragments_welded: Isku-dhaf qasan oo ah jajabyo dhagax oo ay ku xidheen saamaynta meteorite. Dusha Dayaxa waa la garaacayay in ka badan sannado bilyan 4.
somali.lunar_soil_is_ground_up_rock_from_bill: Carrada dayaxa waa dhagax la shiiday oo ka yimid bilyano sannado oo qarxinta meteorite yaryar. Waxay xataa leedahay xabbado yaryar oo galaas ah iyo raadadka qaybaha dabaysha qorraxda.
somali.apollo_17_found_orange_soil_tiny_glass: Apollo 17 wuxuu helay carro oranji ah — xabbado yaryar oo galaas ah oo ka yimid qarax foolkaanik qadiimi ah sannado bilyan 3.7 ka hor. Waa mid ka mid ah daahfurka ugu xiisaha badan ee Apollo!
somali.kreep_stands_for_potassium_k_rare_eart: KREEP wuxuu u taagan yahay Potassium (K), Rare Earth Elements, iyo Phosphorus (P). Macdantaani waxay isugu ururiyeen hadhaagii ugu dambeeyay ee badweynta magma dayaxa.
somali.meteorite_impacts_melt_rock_into_glass: Saamaynta meteorite waxay dhalaaliyaan dhagaxa galaas, kaas oo ku duula hawada oo ku soo dega xabbado yaryar. Qaarkood waxay leeyihiin gaasas laga qabtay jawiga dayaxa qadiimiga ah.
somali.apollo_15_found_this_4_1_billion_year_: Apollo 15 wuxuu helay anorthosite-kan da'diisu tahay sannado bilyan 4.1, mid ka mid ah dhagxaanta ugu da'da weyn ee la aruuriyay. Wuxuu gacan ka geystay caddaynta aragtida badweynta magma ee abuurista Dayaxa.
somali.the_moon_is_about_384_400_km_away_ligh: Dayaxu wuxuu u jiraa qiyaastii km 384,400 — iftiinku wuxuu qaataa ilbiriqsi 1.3 inuu halkaas gaadho!
somali.apollo_missions_took_about_3_days_each: Hawlgalladii Apollo waxay qaadeen qiyaastii 3 maalmood dhinac kasta, iyagoo socda xawaare ~km 3,900/saac.
somali.the_moon_s_gravity_is_1_6_of_earth_s_a: Cuf-isjiidadka Dayaxu waa 1/6 Dhulka. Qof miisaankiisu yahay 70 kg wuxuu miisaamaa kaliya ~12 kg halkaas!
somali.the_sunlit_side_reaches_127_c_while_th: Dhinaca qorraxda leh wuxuu gaadhaa 127°C, halka dhinaca mugdiga ahi hoos ugu dhaco -173°C!
somali.12_astronauts_walked_on_the_moon_acros: 12 cirbixiyeen ayaa ku socday Dayaxa Apollo 11, 12, 14, 15, 16, iyo 17.
somali.buzz_aldrin_said_contact_light_first_b: Buzz Aldrin wuxuu marka hore yidhi «Contact light», laakiin jumladda caanka ah ee Armstrong waxay ku bilaabatay «That's».
somali.the_first_stage_burned_rp_1_kerosene_w: Marxaladda koowaad waxay gubtay kerosene RP-1 oo leh oksijiin dareere ah — in ka badan 2,000 tan oo shidaal ah 2.5 daqiiqo gudahood!
somali.sound_needs_a_medium_air_water_to_trav: Codku wuxuu u baahan yahay dhexdhexaad (hawo/biyo) si uu u safro. Dayaxu ma laha jawi, sidaas darteed waa aamusnaan dhammaystiran.
somali.every_apollo_astronaut_reported_that_m: Cirbixiyeen kasta oo Apollo wuxuu sheegay in boodhka dayaxu uu uriyo sida baaruud la gubay markay LM gudaha keeneen!
somali.the_oldest_moon_rocks_are_4_4_billion_: Dhagxaanta dayaxa ugu da'da weyn waxay jiraan sannado bilyan 4.4 — ku dhowaad da' weyn sida Nidaamka Qorraxda!
somali.the_moon_is_about_384_400_km_away_ligh_2: Dayaxu wuxuu u jiraa qiyaastii km 384,400 — iftiinku wuxuu qaataa ilbiriqsi 1.3 inuu halkaas gaadho!
somali.rotate_spacecraft_to_expose_vent_to_su: Wareeji dayax-gacmeedka si aad daldaloolka u soo bandhigto qorraxda
somali.reroute_cabin_heater_duct_to_warm_the_: Dib u wareeji tuubada kuleyliyaha qolka si aad u kululayso tuubada
somali.seal_the_vent_and_use_backup_waste_bag: Xidh daldaloolka oo isticmaal bacaha qashinka ee gurmadka
somali.abort_the_descent_fire_ascent_engine: Jooji soo degitaanka — shid matoorka kor u kaca
somali.switch_to_full_manual_control: U beddel xakamaynta gacanta oo dhammaystiran
somali.boulder_field_at_landing_site: Beer dhagax weyn oo ku yaal goobta soo degitaanka!
somali.take_manual_control_and_fly_past_the_b: Qaado xakamaynta gacanta oo ka dul duul dhagxaanta
somali.abort_and_try_again_next_orbit: Jooji oo isku day mar kale wareegga xiga
somali.oxygen_tank_pressure_spike: Kor u kaca Cadaadiska Tangiga Oksijiinta
somali.immediately_isolate_tank_2_and_switch_: Isla markiiba go'doomi tangiga 2 oo u beddel tangiga 1
somali.vent_tank_2_to_relieve_pressure: Daadi hawada tangiga 2 si aad u yarayso cadaadiska
somali.try_to_reset_the_tank_heater_circuit: Isku day inaad dib u dejiso wareegga kuleyliyaha tangiga
somali.administer_anti_nausea_medication_and_: Sii dawada lidka lallabbada iyo wakhti nasasho
somali.tough_it_out_keep_working_through_the_: U adkayso — sii wad shaqada inkastoo lallabbo jirto
somali.reduce_visual_stimulation_and_close_wi: Yaree kicinta muuqaalka oo xidh daahyada daaqadda
somali.guided_experience_auto_landing_extende: Khibrad la hoggaamiyo — soo degitaan toosan, O₂ la kordhiyay
somali.realistic_tight_fuel_budget_faster_o_d: Dhab ah — miisaaniyad shidaal cidhiidhi ah, isticmaal O₂ degdeg ah
somali.complete_your_first_eva_moonwalk: Dhammaystir socodkaaga dayaxa EVA ee koowaad
somali.answer_5_quiz_questions_correctly: Si sax ah uga jawaab 5+ su'aalood imtixaan
somali.complete_mission_on_commander_difficul: Dhammaystir hawsha heerka adag ee Taliye
somali.full_mission_simulation_launch_to_spla: Jacaylinta hawsha buuxda • Bilaabid ilaa ku degitaanka biyaha
somali.apollo_style_lunar_landing_mission: Hawsha soo degitaanka dayaxa ee qaabka Apollo
somali.animated_saturn_v_rocket_launch_sequen: Isku-xigxiga bilaabidda gantaalka Saturn V ee dhaqdhaqaaqa leh. Tirin hoos u dhac ilbiriqsi 5 ah oo ay raacdo kor u kac jawiga oo galaya wareegga. Wuxuu muujiyaa dhererka, xawaaraha, awoodda G, iyo kala-soocidda marxaladaha.
somali.saturn_v_3_stages_7_5_million_lbs_thru: 🚀 Saturn V • 3 marxaladood • Riixitaan lbs milyan 7.5
somali.watch_the_countdown_and_ascent_through: Daawo tirinta hoos u dhaca iyo kor u kaca jawiga Dhulka
somali.proceed_to_earth_orbit_phase_after_suc: U soco marxaladda wareegga Dhulka ka dib bilaabid guul leh
somali.animated_view_of_spacecraft_in_low_ear: Aragti dhaqdhaqaaq leh oo dayax-gacmeed ku jira wareegga Dhulka ee hooseeya 185 kiilomitir. CSM wuxuu dhammaystiraa 1.5 wareeg inta daaqadda shidaalka ee Trans-Lunar Injection ay la jaanqaadayso booska mustaqbalka ee Dayaxa. Tiriyaha wareegga, dhererka, xawaaraha, iyo diyaargarowga TLI ayaa la muujiyay.
somali.altitude_185_km_speed_28_000_km_h_1_5_: Dhererka: km 185 • Xawaaraha: km 28,000/saac • 1.5 wareeg ka hor shidista TLI
somali.the_s_ivb_third_stage_will_fire_for_5_: Marxaladda saddexaad ee S-IVB waxay shidan doontaa 5 daqiiqo 47 ilbiriqsi si ay xawaaraha uga kordhiso km 28,000/saac ilaa km 38,900/saac — xawaaraha baxsiga. Shididdan keliya ayaa kuu dirta jid u sii jeedda Dayaxa oo u jira km 384,400.
somali.execute_trans_lunar_injection_burn_to_: Fuli shidista Trans-Lunar Injection si aad u bilowdo safar 3 maalmood ah ee Dayaxa
somali.execute_tli_burn_head_to_the_moon: 🚀 Fuli Shidista TLI — U Soco Dayaxa
somali.animated_trans_lunar_coast_earth_shrin: Safarka Trans-Lunar oo dhaqdhaqaaq leh. Dhulku wuxuu ku yaraadaa dhinaca bidix inta Dayaxu uu ku weynaado dhinaca midig markii dayax-gacmeedku uu safro kiilomitir 384,400 muddo 3 maalmood ah. Wuxuu muujiyaa tiriyaha masaafada iyo wada-hadallada hawsha.
somali.arrive_at_the_moon_and_enter_lunar_orb: Gaadh Dayaxa oo gal wareegga dayaxa ee dhererka kiilomitir 110
somali.animated_view_of_spacecraft_orbiting_t: Aragti dhaqdhaqaaq leh oo dayax-gacmeed ku wareegaya Dayaxa dhererka kiilomitir 110. Wuxuu muujiyaa dusha dayaxa oo godad leh, goobta soo degitaanka ee Badda Xasilloonida oo lagu calaamadeeyay midabka cagaaran, iyo dhibic dayax-gacmeed oo wareegaya.
somali.undock_lunar_module_eagle_from_command: Ka soo go'i qaybta dayaxa Eagle qaybta amarka Columbia oo bilow soo degitaan awood leh ilaa dusha dayaxa
somali.undock_begin_powered_descent: ⬇️ Ka Soo Go'i oo Bilow Soo Degitaan Awood leh
somali.start_slowing_down_early_moon_gravity_: Bilow inaad gaabiso goor hore — cuf-isjiidadka Dayaxu waa jilicsan yahay laakiin naxariis ma laha
somali.watch_your_fuel_gauge_you_can_t_thrust: Eeg cabbiraha shidaalkaaga — ma riixi kartid shidaal la'aan!
somali.reduce_horizontal_speed_before_focusin: Yaree xawaaraha siman ka hor inta aadan diiradda saarin midka toosan
somali.the_real_apollo_11_landed_with_only_25: Apollo 11 dhabta ah wuxuu soo degay isagoo haya kaliya 25 ilbiriqsi oo shidaal ah oo hadhay!
somali.begin_powered_descent_piloting: Bilow kaxaynta soo degitaanka awoodda leh
somali.interactive_lunar_descent_piloting_gam: Ciyaarta kaxaynta soo degitaanka dayaxa ee is-dhexgalka leh. Isticmaal W ama fallaadha kore ee riixitaanka, A iyo D ama fallaadhaha bidix iyo midig ee dhaqdhaqaaqa dhinaca. Ku deg xawaare toosan oo ka yar 3 mitir ilbiriqsigii iyo xawaare siman oo ka yar 5 mitir ilbiriqsigii.
somali.w_thrust_ad_lateral_land_gently: ↑/W = riixitaan • ←→/AD = dhinac • Si tartiib ah u deg!
somali.begin_extravehicular_activity_moonwalk: Bilow howsha gaadhiga ka baxsan (socodka dayaxa) si aad u sahamiso dusha dayaxa oo aad u aruuriso muunadaha cilmiga dhulka
somali.collect_at_least_4_unique_rock_samples: Aruuri ugu yaraan 4 muunad dhagax oo gaar ah si aad u fuliso yoolka cilmiga dhulka.
somali.apollo_11_brought_back_47_5_lb_of_luna: Apollo 11 wuxuu soo celiyay lb 47.5 oo muunado dayax ah; Apollo 17 wuxuu keenay lb 243.
somali.in_one_sixth_gravity_a_hop_covers_abou: Cuf-isjiidadka lix-meelood-meel, boodku wuxuu daboolaa qiyaastii lix jeer masaafada siman ee isku dadaal ah.
somali.earth_hangs_in_a_fixed_spot_in_the_lun: Dhulku wuxuu ka laadlaadaa meel go'an oo cirka dayaxa ah sababtoo ah Dayaxu wuxuu ku jiraa wareeg isku mid ah (waxaa xidhay xoogga mawjadda).
somali.moonwalk_3d_mode_unresolved: Habka 3D ee Socodka Dayaxa Lama Xallin
somali.webgl_failed_to_initialize_your_browse: WebGL wuu ku guuldarraystay inuu bilaabmo. Browser-kaaga ama qalabkaaga ayaa laga yaabaa inaysan taageerin dardargelinta qalabka 3D.
somali.interactive_3d_lunar_surface_eva_use_w: EVA 3D is-dhexgal ah oo dusha dayaxa ah. Isticmaal WASD si aad u socoto, Space si aad u boodo cuf-isjiidadka lix-meelood-meel, F si aad u aruuriso muunadaha dhagaxa, iyo jiir si aad u eegto hareeraha. Aruuri muunadaha cilmiga dhulka oo sahmi dusha Dayaxa agagaarka qaybta dayaxa.
somali.the_apollo_lunar_surface_experiments_p: Apollo Lunar Surface Experiments Package (ALSEP) wuxuu shaqeeyay sannado ka dib markii cirbixiyeennadu ay tageen. Cabbiraha dhulgariirka wuxuu ogaaday gariirrada dayaxa iyo saamaynta meteorite ilaa 1977.
somali.the_lunar_roving_vehicle_cost_38_milli: Lunar Roving Vehicle wuxuu ku kacay dollar milyan 38. Gaadhiga Apollo 17 wuxuu safray km 35.7 — wali waxaa lagu dhigay Dayaxa furayaal!
somali.the_flags_on_the_moon_have_been_bleach: Calammada Dayaxa ku yaal waxay u beddelmeen caddaan saafi ah sababtoo ah tobannaan sano oo shucaac UV ah oo aan la sifayn. Calanka Apollo 12 oo keliya ayaa qiiqa matoorka dhulqaaday.
somali.lunar_seismometers_detected_deep_moonq: Cabbirayaasha dhulgariirka dayaxa waxay ogaadeen gariirro dayax oo qoto dheer oo ay sababeen xoogagga mawjadaha Dhulka qoto dheer km 700-1100. Dayaxu wali wuxuu leeyahay xudun qayb ahaan dhalaashay!
somali.scientists_bounce_lasers_off_this_mirr: Saynisyahannadu waxay laser ka soo celiyaan muraayaddan si ay u cabbiraan masaafada Dhulka-Dayaxa oo saxnaan cm 1 ah. Dayaxu wuxuu ka fogaadaa cm 3.8 Dhulka sannad kasta.
somali.animated_lunar_ascent_sequence_ascent_: Isku-xigxiga kor u kaca dayaxa ee dhaqdhaqaaqa leh. Marxaladda kor u kaca waxay ka bilaabataa Dayaxa iyadoo ka tagaysa marxaladda soo degitaanka gadaal, waxay kor u baxaysaa wareegga dayaxa in ka badan kiilomitir 60, ka dibna waxay samaynaysaa kulan-isku-xidhid qaybta amarka Columbia ee wareegaysa. HUD wuxuu muujiyaa dhererka, marxaladda, iyo masaafada ilaa CSM.
somali.lunar_ascent_rendezvous: Kor u kaca Dayaxa iyo Kulanka
somali.ascent_stage_launches_from_moon_docks_: Marxaladda kor u kaca waxay ka bilaabataa Dayaxa waxayna isku xidhataa Columbia
somali.the_lm_s_ascent_engine_a_single_start_: Matoorka kor u kaca ee LM — matoor hypergolic hal-bilow ah oo aan lahayn ikhtiyaar joojin — wuxuu shidan yahay si uu kaaga bilaabo dusha dayaxa. Marxaladda soo degitaanka waxay u shaqaysaa sidii furaha bilaabidda waxayna ka hadhaa gadaal. Waad la kulantaa oo isku xidhataa Columbia, ka dibna waxaad tuurtaa «Eagle» (kaas oo ugu dambeyntii ku dhaca Dayaxa).
somali.fire_trans_earth_injection_burn_to_beg: Shid shidista Trans-Earth Injection si aad u bilowdo safarka 3 maalmood ee soo noqoshada guriga
somali.returning_home_384_400_km_3_days: Ku soo noqoshada guriga • km 384,400 • ~3 maalmood
somali.the_service_module_engine_fires_for_th: Matoorka qaybta adeegga wuxuu u shidan yahay Trans-Earth Injection. Waxaad u dabaalataa Dhulka 3 maalmood, adigoo tuuraya qaybta adeegga, oo u diyaarinaya qaybta amarka dib-u-galitaanka — marxaladda ugu khatarta badan ee hawsha.
somali.begin_atmospheric_re_entry_sequence_at: Bilow isku-xigxiga dib-u-galitaanka jawiga km 39,900 saacaddii
somali.animated_re_entry_sequence_command_mod: Isku-xigxiga dib-u-galitaanka ee dhaqdhaqaaqa leh. Qaybta amarka waxay gashaa jawiga km 39,900/saac oo leh kuleylka plasma ilaa darajo 2,760. Wuxuu muujiyaa go'idda raadiyaha, baarashuudaha hore, baarashuudaha waaweyn, iyo ku degitaanka biyaha badda.
somali.watch_the_command_module_survive_re_en: Daawo qaybta amarka oo ka badbaadaysa dib-u-galitaanka iyada oo loo marayo plasma 2,760°C ah km 39,900/saac, oo furaysa baarashuudaha, oo ku degaysa Badweynta Baasifigga.
somali.complete_the_mission_with_pacific_ocea: Dhammaystir hawsha adigoo ku degaya biyaha Badweynta Baasifigga. Ku soo dhowow guriga, Taliye!
somali.mission_complete_splashdown: 🌊 Hawsha Way Dhammaatay — Ku Degitaan Biyaha!
somali.welcome_home_commander_the_world_celeb: Ku soo dhowow guriga, Taliye. Adduunku wuu dabbaaldegayaa.
somali.these_samples_will_be_studied_by_scien: Muunadahan waxaa baadhi doona saynisyahanno tobannaan sano oo soo socda.
somali.reset_and_start_a_new_moon_mission_fro: Dib u deji oo bilow hawl dayax cusub bilowga laga bilaabo
somali.tsiolkovsky_rocket_equation_adjust_mas: Isle'egta gantaalka Tsiolkovsky. Hagaaji saamiga cufka, mudada shidista, iyo riixitaanka gaarka ah (Isp). Natiijo gooni ah oo 3 xaaladood ah ayaa muujinaysa haddii delta-V-gaagu uu ku filan yahay, gaadho LEO, ama uu ka baxsado Dhulka. Dhibco ma jiraan, daahfur ma jiro.
somali.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_w: Mala-awaal (qoraal xor ah — jawaab sax ah ma jirto): Lifaaqee baa ugu muhiimsan?
somali.stuck_show_open_prompts: 🤔 Waad ku dhegtay — Muuji su'aalaha furan
somali.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Hay laba sliders oo deggan. Dhaqaaji mid. Eeg.
somali.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_o: Hel laba goob oo soo saaraya natiijo isku mid ah.
somali.which_slider_affects_v_the_most_use_th: Sliderkee ayaa saamayn ugu badan ku leh Δv? Isticmaal diiwaanka.
somali.real_spacecraft_trade_fuel_mass_agains: Dayax-gacmeedyada dhabta ah waxay ka ganacsadaan cufka shidaalka iyadoo lagu eegayo Isp. Sahmi sababta.
somali.i_think_i_understand_the_trade_offs: Waxaan u maleynayaa inaan fahmay isweydaarsiga
somali.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_mass_: Ku sharrax erayadaada: sidee ayay saamiga cufka, mudada shidista, iyo Isp u wada shaqeeyaan?
somali.design_note_discrete_3_state_outcome_n: Qoraalka naqshadeynta: natiijo gooni ah oo 3 xaaladood ah; dhibco ma jiraan; daahfur ma jiro — si ula kac ah.
